JOIN fact_streptococci fs ON s.station_id = fs.station_id
JOIN dim_time t ON fs.year = t.year
WHERE t.year = 2023
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fact_streptococci fs2021
    JOIN dim_time t2021 ON fs2021.year = t2021.year
    WHERE fs2021.station_id = s.station_id
    AND t2021.year = 2021
)
ORDER BY s.station_name;
